name: Viney
description: Viney has brown hair with four wefted bangs and a messy bun held together by a dark orange spiked hair tie. She has pointed ears, similar to the other witches of the Boiling Isles. She has green eyes with one lash on the top and one lash on the bottom; however, unlike the other characters, she and Jerbo both do not have a white shine in their eyes during the first season.
